description: Calling a synchronous blocking API inside an asyncio coroutine, freezing the entire event loop and all concurrent tasks.
body: Failure mode: a coroutine calls requests.get, time.sleep, or a sync DB driver, so while one task blocks no other task on the loop can run and the service appears hung under concurrency. Detection signals: asyncio debug mode logs 'Executing <Task> took 0.5 seconds'; throughput collapses as concurrency rises; latency spikes are serialized. Do not use blocking IO or sleep inside async def. Safer fallback: switch to async clients (httpx/aiohttp), use asyncio.sleep, or wrap unavoidable sync work in asyncio.to_thread / run_in_executor, then confirm via debug-mode slow-callback logs going silent.
